form.formComment: Last start won by 2.75 len at this track March 30 over 1300m defeating Percival with 56kg at $4.40. The race before that 7th of 11 at this track on March 2 over 1000m, on a wet track; 9 len behind Admiral Speed carrying 58kg at $3.50. Can go right on with the job now.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming 7th of 10 at this track on February 24 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 5 len behind Tallulah carrying 54kg at $31. Second run from a spell 4th of 7 at this track on March 24 over 1000m, 2.25 len behind Capitao Pueblero with 53kg at $9.80. Capable of a better showing. Respect.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 35-day let-up. At the latest run second last of 8 at this track on March 10 over 1000m, 23 len behind Labuta carrying 58kg at $4.40. The start before that second last of 10 at this track on February 2 over 1000m, on heavy track; 24 len behind Sal E Pimenta carrying 58kg at $12.10. Hard to envisage a win today.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months ran last of 7 at this track on March 24 over 1000m, 15 len behind Brick Hot carrying 59kg at $9. Previously second-up 3rd of 12 at this track on July 20 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Dispatcher with 56kg at $25.60. Among the top chances.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months 5th of 7 at this track on March 24 over 1000m, 12 len behind Brick Hot with 52kg at $78.20. Previously second-up 6th of 8 at this track on October 7 over 1000m, 8 len behind Dala Blue carrying 55kg at $54.30. Must improve significantly.
